meaning: adj.花布织机的n.提花机,提花织物
examples: The split skirt is designed with an inset of purple and golden jacquard.
Jacquard is a community project, hosted on a wiki.
The invention came to be known as the Jacquard loom.
Varanasi silk marries the Jacquard card technique of enabling subtle and varying designs with Chinese silk thread.
Jacquard developed several machines but made his breakthrough after Napoleon had lost power.
